alice_network.description: Standard crew communication and station-wide broadcasts.

sub_channels.name: general
sub_channels.purpose: The watercooler. Casual chatter, rumors, and complaints. Sets the baseline 'normal' before things go wrong.

sub_channels.name: announcements
sub_channels.purpose: Official PR updates, automated alarms, and 'everything is fine' corporate gaslighting.

sub_channels.name: medical-advisory
sub_channels.purpose: Starts as standard health tips, but slowly fills with panic over a spreading 'purple vein' infection.

alice_network.description: Restricted research logs and bio-containment discussions.

sub_channels.name: project-eden
sub_channels.purpose: The main sci-fi horror plot. Logs about the alien flora that has started 'whispering' to the researchers.

sub_channels.name: containment-logs
sub_channels.purpose: Automated and manual reports tracking the escape of the mysterious 'black goo' in the vents.

sub_channels.name: specimen-obs
sub_channels.purpose: Creepy, clinical transcripts documenting the rapid mutation and hostility of the plant life.

alice_network.description: Infrastructure, life support, and mechanical maintenance.

sub_channels.name: sys-maintenance
sub_channels.purpose: Your forged 'home' channel. Techs arguing over failing pipes and contaminated, purple recycling water.

sub_channels.name: life-support
sub_channels.purpose: Oxygen and pressure readouts. Builds tension as the O2 numbers slowly drop throughout the game.

sub_channels.name: orion-backups
sub_channels.purpose: A dead channel containing the frantic, final text logs of the senior engineer before he vanished.

alice_network.description: Highly classified. Security logs and executive overrides.

sub_channels.name: access-logs
sub_channels.purpose: Restricted. Security tracking door pings. They will eventually notice your fake ID accessing places it shouldn't.

sub_channels.name: airlock-control
sub_channels.purpose: Discussions revealing the terrifying truth: the Director has remotely locked all the escape pods.

sub_channels.name: director-override
sub_channels.purpose: The conspiracy reveal. Hidden chats proving the crew are considered 'expendable test subjects.'

alice_network.description: Mainframe operations and core AI cognitive processes.

sub_channels.name: core-diagnostics
sub_channels.purpose: Hexadecimal errors and fragmented code showing the station AI is either decaying, going rogue, or evolving.

sub_channels.name: quarantine-lock
sub_channels.purpose: Remains completely empty until the climax, when it suddenly fills with station-wide lockdown commands.

sub_channels.name: /dev/null
sub_channels.purpose: A glitchy, hidden channel. This is where the AI bypasses all safety protocols to DM you directly.
